value_chain_position: B2B payment networks — operates fleet fuel card, corporate lodging payment and cross-border FX payment rails; a toll-taker on commercial vehicle and corporate spend volume.
relative_comps: CPAY (formerly FleetCor) owns proprietary closed-loop networks in fleet fuel (North America, Brazil) and lodging that are structurally hard to displace — fuel merchants accept the card because fleets demand it. 27% FCF margin and consistent 10%+ CAGR reflect the toll-taker model. WEX is the closest direct competitor in fleet; FLLT in vehicle tracking adjacency. FMP placed CPAY in Software - Infrastructure but the economics are pure fintech rails; AI infrastructure theme hint is incorrect — this is not an AI compute toll-taker. Fintech rails is the correct single theme.
